description: M4-05 airborne wheel D-14 gate. Car offset to X=2.0 so only the LEFT wheels traverse the ramp at 50 km/h (13.889 m/s) (right wheel sphere needs car_X > 1.638 to fully clear ramp side). At the ramp lip the left wheels launch into the air (fz=0) while the right wheels stay on flat ground. Asserts fz=0 ⇒ fy=0, sa=0, fn=0. Auto-records 3 s.
